author: Support Admin
content: Thanks for this suggestion! Dark mode is definitely on our roadmap. We're planning to implement this in the next major release. I'll keep you updated on progress.

author: Sarah Chen
content: That's great to hear! Would it be possible to also include an auto-switch based on system preferences?

author: Support Admin
content: Absolutely! Auto-switching based on system preferences (prefers-color-scheme) is definitely part of the plan. We'll also include a manual toggle for users who want to override their system settings.

author: Product Manager
content: This is a high-priority request that we're actively working on. We're evaluating email service providers and working on the notification templates. Expected timeline is 2-3 weeks for initial implementation.

author: Mike Rodriguez
content: Fantastic! Will users be able to customize which notifications they receive? Some might only want critical updates.

author: Product Manager
content:
Yes! We're designing a comprehensive notification preferences panel where users can choose:
• Which events trigger emails
• Frequency (immediate, daily digest, weekly)
• Email format preferences
• Opt-out options for specific notification types

author: Technical Lead
content:
We're analyzing the technical requirements for file attachments. Key considerations:
• Security scanning for uploaded files
• CDN integration for fast delivery
• Cost implications for storage

We'll need to implement virus scanning and validate file types carefully.

author: Alex Thompson
content: Security is definitely important! Would it be possible to support .log files? Those are crucial for debugging issues.

author: Technical Lead
content:
Absolutely! .log files are essential for technical support. Our planned supported formats include:
• Images: jpg, png, gif, webp
• Documents: pdf, txt, md
• Archives: zip (contents will be scanned)
• Logs: .log, .txt, .json
• Code: most common extensions with syntax highlighting

author: UX Designer
content:
Great suggestion! We're working on wireframes for an advanced search interface. The design will include:
• Quick filter buttons for common searches
• Advanced filter panel that slides out
• Search result highlighting
• Saved search functionality

Would love to get your feedback once we have mockups ready!

author: Security Team
content:
SSO integration is critical for our enterprise customers. We're prioritizing this feature and have begun security reviews. Current plan includes:
• Google Workspace integration (Phase 1)
• Microsoft Azure AD (Phase 1) 
• Okta and Auth0 (Phase 2)
• Custom SAML providers (Phase 3)

Phase 1 should be ready within 4-6 weeks.

author: Lisa Anderson
content: Excellent! We use Azure AD, so Phase 1 timing works perfectly. Will there be any migration process needed for existing accounts?

author: Security Team
content:
We're designing a smooth migration process! Existing users will be able to:
• Link their current account to SSO during first SSO login
• Maintain all their ticket history and preferences
• Keep the same email address as their account identifier

We'll provide detailed migration guides before rollout.
